channel.title: Posts on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on ExitCode0

item.title: Give Claude Code Eyes Inside Your WSL2 Docker Containers
item.description: Stop copy-pasting Docker Compose logs into Claude Code. Set up SSH access into WSL2 so Claude can read your container logs directly - the same trick that powers a pentest workflow with a Kali VM.

item.title: Running Ollama in a Proxmox LXC with NVIDIA GPU Passthrough
item.description: A complete guide to setting up Ollama inside a Proxmox LXC container with full NVIDIA GPU passthrough, Tailscale access, and Open WebUI — run your own local LLMs with GPU acceleration.

item.title: How to Migrate VMs Between Standalone Proxmox Nodes Without Clustering
item.description: A complete guide to migrating VMs between standalone Proxmox hosts without clustering, using vzdump streaming over SSH

item.title: Home Assistant With ESPhome Bluetooth Proxies
item.description: Extend Home Assistant Bluetooth range using ESPHome wireless proxies on ESP32. Connect BLE sensors like SwitchBot thermometers over WiFi without a USB Bluetooth adapter.

item.title: Sonoff ZBMINIL2 Wiring Guide
item.description: A simple no neutral wiring diagram guide for the Sonoff ZBMINIL2 and how to retain the standard switch.

item.title: Complete 2024 Guide: How to expand a Ubuntu LVM LV to use all space on the PV
item.description: Expand a Ubuntu LVM logical volume to fill available physical drive space using lvextend and resize2fs. Reclaim free space when the root partition reaches capacity.

item.title: Testing Llama3.1 (8B) With LM Studio
item.description: Taking a look at the the latest open source llama 3.1 model after its July 2024 release. Testing its performance and accuracy with GPT4ALL.

item.title: Feeding My Cat With Home Assistant
item.description: Tired of manually feeding your cat? Learn how to automate your Tuya cat feeder with Home Assistant and ensure your furry friend is always fed on time.

item.title: Using an Amazon FireHD8 as a Home Assistant Dashboard Control Panel
item.description: Home Assistant has continues to make progress in the self-hosted home automation field, so let's take a look at using the Amazon FireHD8 tablet as a control panel

item.title: Testing Llama3 With LM Studio
item.description: Taking a look at the the latest open source llama 3 model after its April 2024 release. Testing its performance and accuracy with LM Studio.

item.title: Generating Artwork With Stable Diffusion - April 2024 Edition
item.description: A look at the state of artwork generation with stable-diffusion in April 2024. Investigating if (local) stable-diffusion can reliably produce enjoyable artwork.

item.title: Home Assistant HTTPS Certificates with Tailscale, Traefik and CoreDNS
item.description: Secure Home Assistant with HTTPS using Tailscale MagicDNS and a Traefik reverse proxy. Automate TLS certificate renewal with CoreDNS and Docker Compose — no port forwarding needed.

item.title: Python Development in Docker Containers
item.description: Develop Python scripts inside Docker containers for reproducible, isolated environments. Compare containerised workflows versus virtual environments for consistent team tooling.

item.title: Automating Postgres Deployment with Docker Compose and Init Scripts
item.description: Deploy PostgreSQL with Docker Compose and an init script that auto-creates databases and users. Portable, isolated Postgres setup with Docker Compose V2 and Bash initialisation.

item.title: Setting up Wyoming Piper with Docker Compose
item.description: Deploy Wyoming Piper text-to-speech in Docker for Home Assistant. Enable local voice output with Rhasspy integration and multiple language and voice model support.

item.title: How to Use a Docker Compose File for Wyoming Whisper
item.description: Run Whisper speech-to-text in Docker for local Home Assistant voice assistant. Configure Wyoming Whisper with a lightweight model for fast local speech recognition.

item.title: Homeassistant Enable MagicDNS and HTTPS Certificates in Tailscale
item.description: Enable HTTPS certificates for Home Assistant using Tailscale MagicDNS. Generate valid TLS credentials for local voice control without port forwarding or a public domain.

item.title: Passing Through an NVMe Drive to an ESXi Virtual Machine
item.description: Pass through NVMe drives to ESXi virtual machines via RDM raw device mapping. Enable VM direct storage access to physical NVMe disks for specialised workloads.

item.title: Running Uptime Kuma With Docker Compose
item.description: Deploy Uptime Kuma website and API monitoring with Docker Compose. Self-hosted uptime tracker and status page for infrastructure monitoring in a home lab.

item.title: Welcome [Back]
item.description:
A new beinging for this blog…

The ExitCode0 blog is currently migrating. Welcome to the site, please hang tight for more content, coming soon. This site should now be in hosted on GitHub pages!

item.title: How to force the Windows 11 upgrade
item.description: Force the Windows 11 upgrade on a compatible machine using Microsoft's update assistant tool. Skip the automatic rollout and install the latest Windows OS immediately.

item.title: Turn off TPLink Smart plug LED
item.description: Turn off the status LED on TP-Link Kasa smart plugs using a Python script. Disable indicator lights on HS100 and HS110 models to reduce light pollution in a dark room.

item.title: Customising the PowerShell prompt to show date and time
item.description: Customise the PowerShell prompt to show date, time, and history ID. Add coloured output and shortened working directory paths using $PROFILE in Windows Terminal.

item.title: Adding Bluetooth to a VW RCD 300
item.description: Add Bluetooth to a VW RCD 300 head unit using a CD changer adapter. No VCDS coding required — wireless music streaming in a Caddy or Transporter without replacing the radio.

item.title: More RTX 3060 Nicehash overclocking
item.description: Optimise RTX 3060 mining performance with advanced overclocking to reach 48 MH/s. MSI Afterburner core reduction and memory boost settings for sustained Nicehash profitability.

item.title: RTX 3060 Nicehash mining overclock settings
item.description: Achieve 44+ MH/s on an RTX 3060 with Nicehash overclocking. Core clock reduction and memory overclock settings in MSI Afterburner for maximum Ethereum mining hash rate.

item.title: Unlock RTX 3060 mining hash rate
item.description: Unlock the full RTX 3060 mining hash rate using developer driver 470.05. Double Nicehash performance from 22 MH/s to 42 MH/s by bypassing NVIDIA's software hash limiter.

item.title: Honeygain docker-compose setup
item.description: Deploy Honeygain in a Docker container with Docker Compose. Earn passive income by sharing unused bandwidth from a home server or always-on machine.

item.title: Unraid USB Controller Passthrough - VM hot swap USB
item.description: Pass through a USB controller to an UNRAID VM for hot-swap USB device support. Enable persistent USB attachment using an Inateck PCIe card and libvirt device configuration.

item.title: Collect bitcoin price data with python and Coinbase
item.description: Collect live Bitcoin and crypto price data from the Coinbase API using Python 3. Store time-series readings in InfluxDB and visualise price trends in Grafana dashboards.

item.title: Writing to an InfluxDB server with Python3
item.description: Write time-series data to InfluxDB from Python 3 for Grafana visualisation. Store sensor readings with nanosecond timestamps using the influxdb-client library.

item.title: Fortigate: AP-Bridge with a hardware switch
item.description: Configure Fortigate access point bridge SSIDs mapped to isolated VLANs. Tag wireless clients to security zones with CAPWAP management for home lab network isolation.

item.title: Fortigate: Add a VLAN to a hardware switch
item.description: Create VLANs on a Fortigate hardware switch with DHCP server and inter-VLAN firewall rules. Configure 802.1Q trunk ports for network segmentation in FortiOS 6.0+.

item.title: Debian 10 - How to upgrade python 3.7 to python 3.9
item.description: Upgrade Python 3.7 to 3.9 on Debian 10 by compiling from source and using update-alternatives. Resolve pip and lsb_release compatibility issues after major version change.

item.title: Calculating compound interest with Python 3
item.description: Calculate compound interest in Python 3 with a reusable function. Covers principal, rate, and period inputs with formatted currency output and annual breakdown.

item.title: How to force the Windows 10 20H2 update
item.description: Manually install Windows 10 20H2 using the Microsoft Update Assistant. Bypass the phased rollout of the October 2020 feature update on compatible hardware.

item.title: How to invoke UAC in a Windows Batch script
item.description: Trigger a UAC elevation prompt from a Windows batch script using a VBScript helper. Re-run the original script with administrator privileges automatically when accepted.

item.title: How To call a bash command with variables in Python
item.description: Call bash commands with variable arguments from Python 3 using subprocess. Pass dynamic values to shell commands and capture stdout output for scripting and automation.

item.title: Monitor your public IP address with Python
item.description: Monitor public IP address changes in Python using OpenDNS API lookups. Detect VPN connection drops and verify IP masking with a continuous polling loop and alerting.

item.title: How to pass through a drive to a UNRAID VM
item.description: Pass physical hard drives directly to UNRAID VMs for raw storage access. Preserve Windows installations by attaching an SSD to a KVM VM using the unassigned devices plugin.

item.title: [FIXED] Bose Bluetooth headphones with Windows 10
item.description: Fix Bose Bluetooth audio quality and microphone feedback loop on Windows 10. Switch from the generic Bluetooth driver to Microsoft A2DP Source for high-fidelity audio.

item.title: How to force the Windows 10 2004 update
item.description: Force Windows 10 version 2004 to install immediately using Microsoft's Update Assistant. Skip the staggered rollout and upgrade to the May 2020 feature update manually.

item.title: How to check if RAM is running in ECC mode
item.description: Check whether system RAM supports ECC error correction on Windows and Linux. Use dmidecode or WMIC commands to verify ECC memory installation in servers and workstations.

item.title: Adding WMIC command to the Windows path
item.description: Add C:\Windows\System32\wbem to Windows PATH to restore the wmic command. Fix 'wmic is not recognized' errors on Windows 10 after system updates or environment variable changes.

item.title: How To: Raspberry Pi boot from USB
item.description: Enable USB boot on a Raspberry Pi 4 from an external SSD using the EEPROM bootloader update. Improve boot speed and reliability over SD card with persistent mass storage.

item.title: Copy Paste in vSphere before installing VMware tools
item.description: Send text to a vSphere VM before VMware Tools is installed using AutoIT keystrokes. Bypass clipboard limitations during fresh OS installs and initial VM configuration.

item.title: Automatically pause Spotify with the 3CX client
item.description: Automatically pause Spotify when a 3CX VoIP call arrives using an AutoIT background script. Prevent music playing over calls with a lightweight tray application.

item.title: Python 3 SSH with Paramiko
item.description: Run remote SSH commands in Python 3 with the Paramiko library. Connect with password or key authentication, execute commands, and capture stdout and stderr output.

item.title: How To: Python infinite loops with while true
item.description: Build Python infinite loops with while True for continuous polling or monitoring scripts. Handle KeyboardInterrupt exceptions for graceful exit and include sleep intervals.

item.title: How to upgrade Ubuntu from 18.04 to 20.04
item.description: Upgrade Ubuntu 18.04 LTS to 20.04 LTS in-place using do-release-upgrade. Preserve installed packages and configuration during a major release upgrade.

item.title: Setup the Nextcloud Snap Package with HTTPS and a separate data path
item.description: Install Nextcloud snap on Ubuntu with Let's Encrypt HTTPS and a separate data mount. Self-hosted cloud storage with automatic certificate renewal and external HDD support.

item.title: Prevent Screensavers and Lock-screens with Powershell
item.description: Prevent the Windows screensaver and lock screen activating using a PowerShell SendKeys loop. Keep a PC awake indefinitely with a timed keypress — no Group Policy changes needed.

item.title: Backup Nextcloud with RCLONE
item.description: Back up a self-hosted Nextcloud instance to UNRAID NAS using Rclone WebDAV integration. Automated encrypted cloud-to-local sync with selective folder targeting.

item.title: Convert an ESXi VM to UNRAID KVM with qume-img convert
item.description: Convert ESXi VMDK virtual machines to UNRAID KVM format using qemu-img convert. Migrate VMs between hypervisors with preserved Windows drivers and boot configuration.

item.title: Backup Google Photos with Rclone
item.description: Back up Google Photos to a local NAS or computer with Rclone. Automated offline copy of your entire photo library with WebDAV sync and scheduled cron jobs.

item.title: Kali Linux 2020.1 - No more root by default
item.description: Kali Linux 2020.1 drops root as default user, switching to standard privilege model. How the change affects penetration testing workflows and sudo configuration in the new setup.

item.title: Secure DDNS - Namecheap SSL With DDClient
item.description: Keep Namecheap DNS records updated automatically with DDClient over SSL. Configure dynamic DNS for roaming public IP addresses with encrypted HTTPS protocol.

item.title: How to make a VirtualBox VM the same resolution as host
item.description: Match a VirtualBox VM resolution to the host display using the VBoxSVGA graphics controller. Enable fullscreen scaling and dynamic resolution adjustment for a seamless VM experience.

item.title: How to enable subnet overlapping on a Fortigate
item.description: Enable subnet overlapping on Fortigate to assign the same IP range to multiple interfaces. Configure allow-subnet-overlap in the FortiOS CLI for HA management IP isolation.

item.title: Python 2.7 end-of-life - The time to upgrade is upon us
item.description: Python 2.7 reaches end of life on 1 January 2020 — no further security patches after that date. How to plan the migration to Python 3 for production scripts and dependencies.

item.title: Kasa home automation with IFTTT and python webhooks
item.description: Automate TP-Link Kasa smart plugs using IFTTT webhooks triggered from Python scripts. Control smart home devices conditionally from any application with HTTP requests.

item.title: AWUS036AC (rtl8812au) driver setup in Kali Linux
item.description: Install Alfa AWUS036AC (rtl8812au) wireless adapter drivers on Kali Linux for monitor mode and packet injection. Aircrack-ng compatible with manual dkms build method.

item.title: Kali Linux - How to upgrade python 2.7 to python 3.7
item.description: Set Python 3.7 as default in Kali Linux replacing outdated Python 2.7. Configure interpreter priority with update-alternatives for modern scripting and security tools.

item.title: Ubuntu 19.10 - How to upgrade python 2.7 to python 3.7
item.description: Upgrade Python default version on Ubuntu 19.10 from 2.7 to 3.7. Configure interpreter priority and resolve pip compatibility issues on a modern Ubuntu release.

item.title: Getting started with Python 3 - a beginner's cheat sheet
item.description: Python 3 beginner cheat sheet covering variables, loops, functions, and string handling. Quick reference guide for foundational programming with practical, runnable examples.

item.title: Clipboard and Shared Folders on Kali Linux with VirtualBox
item.description: Enable clipboard sync and shared folders on Kali Linux in VirtualBox. Install virtualbox-guest-x11 for seamless copy-paste and folder sharing between host and guest.

item.title: [SOLVED] - Running Docker on a Raspberry Pi 4
item.description: Fix Docker installation errors on Raspberry Pi 4 with Raspbian Buster. Resolve kernel cgroup compatibility issues to run containers on ARM-based single-board computers.

item.title: Changing the default python version in Debian
item.description: Change default Python version in Debian from 2.7 to 3.x using update-alternatives. Set interpreter priority and switch between multiple installed Python versions.

item.title: Using a DHT11 sensor with a raspberry pi
item.description: Connect a DHT11 temperature and humidity sensor to a Raspberry Pi using GPIO pins. Read environmental data in Python without soldering using pre-made 3-pin sensor connectors.

item.title: Double NAT port forwarding with a Fortigate
item.description: Configure Fortigate VIP port forwarding through a double NAT setup. Route external traffic via a DMZ IP through nested gateways to reach internal services like Plex.

item.title: Debian 9 - Running a python script at boot
item.description: Run a Python script automatically on Debian boot using crontab @reboot. Execute scripts with parameters, redirect output, and verify startup with journalctl logging.

item.title: Debian 9 - How to upgrade python 3.5 to python 3.7
item.description: Install Python 3.7 on Debian 9 by compiling from source, replacing 3.5 as default. Fix pip and system library issues with update-alternatives after a major upgrade.

item.title: Creating a local DNS server with Pi Hole
item.description: Set up Pi-Hole as a local DNS resolver on Debian for network-wide ad blocking. Configure DHCP integration and custom DNS overrides for a home lab environment.

item.title: Modifying Windows shortcuts is Powershell
item.description: Recursively update Windows shortcut targets in PowerShell using WScript.Shell COM objects. Batch-fix broken .lnk files after moving applications or changing drive letters.

item.title: Powershell - Checking the Language Mode
item.description: Check PowerShell execution language mode on Windows to identify ConstrainedLanguage restrictions. Verify security policy settings before running administrative or automation scripts.

item.title: 'Copy, Paste' With Powershell Sendkeys
item.description: Paste complex strings to UAC prompts with PowerShell SendKeys scripting. Bypass clipboard restrictions in elevated dialogs with automated keystroke injection.
